prompt:
In home/workstation.nix, add xdg.configFile entries for Wayland flags:

1. chrome-flags.conf with:
   --ozone-platform=wayland
   --enable-features=WaylandWindowDecorations

2. electron-flags.conf with:
   --ozone-platform=wayland
   --enable-features=WaylandWindowDecorations

Also add the JetBrains Wayland fix: add _JAVA_AWT_WM_NONREPARENTING = "1" to the environment.sessionVariables in modules/common/workstation.nix.

Run nixos-rebuild dry-run or nix flake check to validate the config before creating the PR.
